# xenios.

> xenios. (Xenios Technologies) is the AI-native operating system for proactive and preventive health practitioners. Multi-agent. Practitioner-voiced. HIPAA-aware. Built in Austin, TX.

## Core facts
- Product: multi-agent AI OS for health practitioners (coaches, clinicians, longevity, GLP-1, FM, RDs, recovery, mental performance)
- Headquarters: Austin, TX, USA
- Contact: team@xeniostechnology.com
- Social: instagram.com/officialxenios, linkedin.com/company/officialxenios
- Status: stealth, pre-seed, waitlist open
- Heritage: from a team with $710M+ in prior exits, including FinDox and InstaMed

## What xenios. does
xenios. gives every proactive health practitioner a multi-agent system (eight specialized agents — Onboarding, Protocol, Check-in, Communication, Education, Outcomes, Billing, Compliance) that augments — never replaces — the practitioner. Agents work in the practitioner's voice, under their judgment, with HIPAA-aware logging and scope-of-practice guardrails. Practitioners can serve 10× to 100× the clients with 10× the depth of care.

## Ecosystem (designed to connect with — not partnerships)
WHOOP, Oura, Apple Health, Garmin, Polar, Fitbit, Coros, Eight Sleep, Levels, Lingo (Abbott), Dexcom, Stelo, Function Health, Superpower, Inside Tracker, Marek Health, Hone, Quest, Labcorp, Ezra, Prenuvo, Neko Health, Zepbound, Wegovy, Ozempic, Mounjaro, compounded GLP-1 programs, BPC-157 protocols, semaglutide programs, tirzepatide programs, retatrutide programs, Thorne, Pure Encapsulations, Momentous, Designs for Health, Hyperice, Therabody, Plunge, Cronometer, MacroFactor, MyFitnessPal, Headspace, Calm, Othership, Open, Anthropic, OpenAI, TrueCoach exports, Trainerize exports, Stripe, Plaid.

Brand names are property of their respective owners. Integration availability varies.

- [Network](https://xeniostechnology.com/network): agent-to-agent referrals
